app.name: Repressurizer
app.subtitle: Steam Library Manager
app.loading.sub: Fetching games and collections from Steam
app.error.title: Something went wrong
setup.findSteam.desc: We'll locate your Steam installation automatically.
sort.name: Name
collectionCompare.title: Compare Collections
collectionCompare.needsTwo: Create at least two collections to compare them.
filter.title: Filters
settings.title: Settings
settings.search.placeholder: Search settings, tokens, HLTB, tray, exports...
settings.showDynamic.desc: Display Steam's auto-generated categories in the sidebar. Steam manages these read-only categories with the ~ prefix.
settings.pinFavorites.desc: Keep the Favorites collection pinned at the top of the sidebar
settings.currency.desc: Used for library value calculations in Statistics
settings.hltbConcurrency.desc: How many HLTB lookups to run in parallel. Higher = faster but may get rate-limited.
settings.hltbTimeMode.desc: Choose which HowLongToBeat estimate powers sorting, filters, search, and AutoCat.
settings.achievementsConcurrency.desc: How many achievement lookups to run in parallel. Steam API key allows high throughput.
settings.autoFetchDetailsOnRefresh: Auto-fetch Steam details on library refresh
settings.libraryRefreshCacheMode.desc: Choose what cache work starts automatically after a manual or scheduled Steam library refresh.
settings.libraryRefreshCacheMode.full.de: Details, HLTB, original dates, and Steam reviews.
settings.proxyRouting.desc: Applies to backend Steam, Steam Store, HLTB and optional automation requests.
settings.proxyBatch.title: Requests in batch mode
settings.cache.desc: Used by Auto-Categorize for genre, tags, year and score
settings.detailsCacheMaxAge.desc: Steam details older than this are treated as stale by Prepare cache and AutoCat. Set 0 to disable age-based refresh.
settings.depDbImport.title: Import Depressurizer database
settings.depDbImport.desc: Use database.json as a historical fallback for delisted or missing Steam metadata.
settings.depDbImport.extraIds.desc: Extra IDs are optional. Matched IDs can be added as local-only games instead of importing the entire database.
settings.depDbImport.addExtra: Add matched extra IDs as local-only
settings.depDbImport.addExtra.desc: Creates a Depressurizer Database Imports category for extra App IDs found in the database.
settings.depDbImport.names.desc: Use imported names for placeholder and local-only entries.
settings.depDbImport.details.desc: Genres, features, release date, studios, languages and platforms.
settings.depDbImport.tags.desc: Community tags used by AutoCat tags and shown on game details.
settings.depDbImport.hltb.desc: Main, extra and completionist times converted from minutes to hours.
settings.depDbImport.reviews.desc: Historical review percentage and total from Depressurizer.
settings.depDbImport.overwrite.details.d: Replace existing metadata fields with database values.
settings.depDbImport.overwrite.tags.desc: Replace existing imported tags instead of merging them.
settings.depDbImport.overwrite.hltb.desc: Replace existing HLTB fields instead of filling only missing values.
settings.depDbImport.overwrite.reviews.d: Replace cached review summaries with database summaries.
settings.depDbImport.noLibrary: Load your Steam library before importing a Depressurizer database.
settings.depDbImport.noSource: Choose a Depressurizer database.json or zip before importing.
settings.reset.desc: Clears saved credentials and returns to setup.
settings.reset.confirm: Reset all settings? You will need to set up again.
appearance.accentColor.desc: Changes the highlight color throughout the app
appearance.categoryChips.desc: Customize the small category tags shown on game cards and detail views.
appearance.categoryChips.coloredText.des: Use the category color for the label text.
appearance.categoryChips.removeButton.de: Show the category remove icon on hover.
appearance.smartLists.desc: Backlog and Recently Played shortcuts in the sidebar
appearance.emptyLists.desc: Keep sidebar smart lists visible even when they contain 0 games
appearance.nowPlaying.desc: Display the last-played game card at the top of the sidebar
appearance.filterBar.desc: Show the filter and sort bar below the header
appearance.hideCollectionOnly.desc: Hide games that only exist in local Steam collections; the Local collection only filter can still show them.
appearance.sidebarWidth.desc: You can also drag the sidebar edge directly. Default: 224px
backups.desc: A backup is created automatically every time you save.
backups.pinDesc: Backups are created automatically on save. Star important ones to pin them.
backups.restoreConfirm: Restore backup from {date}? This will overwrite your current collections. A pre-restore backup will be created automatically.
backups.deleteConfirm: Delete backup from {date}? This cannot be undone.
backups.restored: Backup restored successfully! Reload Steam to see changes.
ignored.desc: Games that failed to fetch details from Steam {count}+ times are skipped automatically. This usually means the game was removed from the Steam store.
category.deleteDesc: "{name}" will be removed. Games won't be deleted.
category.deleteSelectedDesc: Delete {count} categories? Games stay in your library; only these categories are removed.
category.color.title: Category color
review.title: Your Rating
onboarding.welcome.desc: Let's take a quick tour of your new Steam Library Manager.
onboarding.sidebar.desc: Browse your collections, smart lists, and drag games between categories. Drag categories to reorder them.
onboarding.search.desc: Use advanced filters like genre:rpg, status:playing, hours:>10 to find games quickly.
onboarding.family.desc: Repressurizer can show shared Family games when Steam grants access. We'll check automatically and guide you if a Store token is needed.
onboarding.tools.desc: Auto-categorize, statistics, achievements, wishlists, and more — all accessible from the toolbar.
onboarding.done.desc: Explore your library and make it yours. You can always access settings via the gear icon.
export.title: Export
export.pickCategory: Select a category in the sidebar first
export.pickEmpty: Use Ctrl+click on categories in the sidebar to select them first
export.pickLayoutHint: Flat list deduplicates games; CSV includes a Categories column when a game appears in more than one.
export.titlesOnlyDesc: Export just game names, sorted alphabetically
export.summaryStats: Exporting library statistics and playtime analysis
export.summaryPickEmpty: No categories selected in the sidebar
export.summarySnapshot: Exporting {games} games, {collections} collections, and {hltb} HLTB entries as a portable automation JSON snapshot
export.field.name: Name
export.scope.all.desc: Export every game in your library
export.scope.category.desc: Export games from the active or chosen category
export.scope.categories.desc: Export all categories with their games
export.scope.stats.desc: Library stats, top played, playtime distribution
export.scope.snapshot.desc: Stable JSON for other tools, including collections, Steam metadata, and HLTB
export.scope.pick.desc: Export categories you selected with Ctrl+click in the sidebar
merge.title: Merge categories
merge.subtitle: Combine {count} categories into one. Games are merged; duplicate categories are removed.
merge.nameRequired: Enter a name for the new category
duplicate.title: Duplicate category
metadataRefresh.title: Refresh cached metadata
metadataRefresh.details.desc: Metadata, prices, genres, tags, languages and Store data. Stale after {days} days.
metadataRefresh.details.force: Refresh even when details are still current
metadataRefresh.ratings.desc: Review summaries used by Steam rating AutoCat. Existing reviews are stale after 30 days.
metadataRefresh.ratings.force: Refresh reviews even when still fresh
metadataRefresh.hltb.desc: Fetch missing HLTB entries. Existing entries have no age timestamp yet.
metadataRefresh.releaseDates.desc: Store-page dates used by year AutoCat when Steam API dates are remasters or rereleases.
metadataRefresh.releaseDates.force: Refresh dates that are already cached
metadataRefresh.achievements.desc: Fetch missing achievement summaries for completion filters and AutoCat.
metadataRefresh.none: Nothing to refresh with these options.
metadataRefresh.toast.none: No metadata refresh requests were started.
savePreview.title: Review Steam collection changes
savePreview.desc: Repressurizer will create a backup, then write these collection changes. Close Steam before continuing.
savePreview.noDiff: No collection differences were detected, but the library is marked dirty. Saving will still refresh the Steam collection file and create a backup.
savePreview.steamRunning.title: Steam is running
savePreview.steamRunning.desc: Close Steam before saving collections. Repressurizer will not write collection changes while Steam is open.
savePreview.moreChanged: {count} more changed collections are not shown.
filter.advanced.title: Advanced Filters
settings.family.probeDesc: Uses your saved Steam Web API key first. A saved Steam Store webapi_token is reused automatically when Family needs Store auth.
settings.family.tokenPlaceholder: Paste token or full Steam JSON
settings.family.tokenHelp: Open the page while logged into Steam, copy the JSON, then paste it here. Repressurizer extracts only webapi_token.
settings.family.includeNonGames.desc: Hidden by default so map editors, SDKs, and utilities do not pollute the game list.
settings.family.playtimeUnavailable: Family playtime was unavailable for this probe.
settings.family.expiredHint: Saved Steam Store token may be expired; paste a fresh one.
settings.family.tokenPageFailed: Could not open Steam token page: {error}
settings.family.tokenExtracted: Steam Store token extracted from pasted JSON.
settings.family.tokenRequired: Paste a Steam Store webapi_token first.
settings.steamAppIndex.desc: Used to resolve collection-only app names instantly.
settings.diagnostics.desc: Writes a privacy-safe JSON report without API keys.
settings.automationExport.desc: Builds a portable JSON snapshot of your library, collections, details, and HLTB data when available, then sends it to the configured HTTP endpoint. It does not write to Steam or store cookies.
settings.automationExport.enabled.desc: Keep Repressurizer running in the background. On each interval it rebuilds the snapshot, compares the checksum, and sends an HTTP POST only when the data changed.
settings.automationPayload.title: Automation payload
settings.automationPayload.desc: Publishes a filtered Snapshot JSON v1. The schema stays stable; these options only reduce what is included.
settings.automationExport.guideDesc: Use this when another app or server wants a read-only Repressurizer snapshot.
settings.automationExport.guide.endpoint: Repressurizer sends an HTTP POST to this URL. Use a local or trusted endpoint; add a bearer token when it is exposed beyond your machine.
settings.automationExport.guide.payloadB: The body is repressurizer.library-snapshot.v1 JSON: games, collections, Steam details, playtime, and HLTB matches when available.
settings.automationExport.guide.changeBo: Automatic publishing rebuilds the snapshot on the interval and posts only when the stable checksum changed. Publish now always attempts a post.
settings.automationExport.guide.receiver: Receivers should validate schemaVersion, verify the checksum when possible, upsert by appId, and show Repressurizer as the data source.
settings.automationExport.guide.limitsBo: This is read-only export data. It does not write to Steam, does not import games automatically, and does not send cookies or Steam sessions.
settings.automationExport.guide.packages: Use @crimsab/repressurizer-integration or the Rust crate repressurizer-integration to validate, index, diff, and read HLTB values.
settings.automationExport.guideFooter: Open the public GitHub docs for the full schema, receiver contract, and integration package notes.
settings.automationExport.logsDesc: Recent publish attempts, ordered and filterable.
settings.automationExport.skippedNotConf: Automation export skipped: add an HTTP endpoint first.
settings.automationExport.skippedNoData: Automation export skipped: load a Steam library and collections first.
settings.automationExport.skippedUnchang: Automation export skipped: snapshot checksum has not changed.
settings.updates.desc: Uses the latest GitHub Release updater manifest.
settings.changelog.title: Changelog
settings.changelog.desc: Recent changes generated from release tags and commit subjects.
appearance.customAccent.desc: Pick a color or enter a HEX value.
settings.minimizeToTray.desc: When you close the window, Repressurizer will minimize to the system tray instead of quitting
settings.desktopNotifications.desc: Show native system notifications for manual tray actions and automation export failures.
settings.startOnLogin: Start Repressurizer when you sign in
settings.startOnLogin.desc: Launch Repressurizer automatically with your system so background exports and tray actions are ready.
settings.startOnLogin.registered: Registered with the system startup list.
settings.startOnLogin.notRegistered: Not registered with the system startup list.
settings.startOnLoginMode.tray.desc: Default. Start hidden and keep Repressurizer available from the tray.
settings.startOnLoginMode.window.desc: Show the main window when Repressurizer starts with the system.
tray.closeChoice.title: Close Repressurizer?
tray.closeChoice.desc: Choose what the window close button should do from now on. You can change this later in Settings.
setup.safety.title: Safety check
setup.safety.desc: Repressurizer loads your library first and only writes Steam collections when you press Save later. Close Steam before saving changes, and keep automatic backups enabled.
setup.ready.desc: Your Steam library loaded successfully. Review the summary before opening the app.
setup.collections.title: Collections
setup.backups.note: Automatic backups are created before saves and can be restored from Settings.
setup.saveSafety.note: For safest results, close Steam before pressing Save after editing collections.
wishlist.title: Wishlist
wishlist.sort.name: Name
wishlist.empty: Click "Refresh" to load your Steam wishlist
wishlist.setSteamId: Set your Steam ID in Settings first.
stats.title: Library Statistics
stats.noPriceData: Your cached game details lack price data. Clear the details cache in Settings -> Data, then re-run Auto-Categorize to unlock Cost/Hour and Shame Wall stats.
stats.noDetailsHint: Fetch game details (via Auto-Categorize) to unlock genre, platform, publisher, metacritic, and library value statistics.
auto.title: Auto-Categorize
auto.byCustom.desc: Build one category from combined filters like HLTB, title, playtime, and categories
auto.byName.desc: Create alphabet buckets from game titles
auto.byPlaytime.desc: Group games into buckets by hours played
auto.byGenre.desc: Create a category for each Steam genre
auto.byTags.desc: Create categories from Steam feature tags
auto.byYear.desc: Group games by release year or decade
auto.byScore.desc: Sort games by Metacritic score (Must-Play -> Poor)
auto.byRating.desc: Group games by Steam user review rating
auto.byHltb.desc: Group by HowLongToBeat main story length
auto.byDevPub.desc: Create categories from Steam developer and publisher metadata
auto.byFlags.desc: Create categories from Steam feature flags such as Single-player or Steam Cloud
auto.byLanguage.desc: Create categories from Steam supported language metadata
auto.byPlatform.desc: Create Windows, macOS and Linux support categories
auto.detailsRequired: A Steam API key is required to fetch game details. Add one in Settings.
auto.cache.prepare.desc: Fetch stale or missing details, Steam reviews, and HLTB entries in the background.
auto.cache.prepareStarted: Cache preparation started in the background.
auto.cache.onlyIgnored: The remaining detail entries are ignored or unavailable. Reset ignored Steam details in Settings to retry them.
auto.cache.hltbOnlyIgnored: The remaining HLTB entries are ignored. Reset ignored HLTB games in Settings to retry them.
auto.choose.desc: Pick a strategy to automatically create and populate categories.
auto.cachedOnlyTooltip: Skip {count} games that still need cached data
auto.cachedOnlyNotice: This preview used cached data only. {count} games were skipped because cached data is missing.
auto.cachedOnlyNoMetadata: No cached data is available for this AutoCat yet.
auto.name: Name
auto.maxOpenHint: Set max to 0 for an open-ended bucket (e.g. 60h+).
auto.includeTags: Only include these tags (empty = all tags)
auto.includeUnknownYear: Include games with no release date
auto.metacriticSkipped: Games without a Metacritic score are skipped.
auto.steamRatingSkipped: Games with no Steam reviews are skipped.
auto.useWilsonScore.desc: Applies Depressurizer's stricter lower-bound score before matching buckets.
auto.useWilsonScore.explain: Wilson score estimates a conservative positive-review percentage. It keeps games with very few reviews from being treated like sure 100% hits, while heavily reviewed games stay close to their real positive percentage.
auto.fetchingDetails: Fetching game details from Steam API...
auto.fetchingBackground: You can close this dialog - fetching continues in the background.
auto.previewHint: Games will be added to existing categories with matching names, or new categories will be created.
auto.rememberSave: Remember to save to keep the changes.
auto.backupFailed: Backup failed; no categories were changed: {error}
auto.backupUnavailable: A safety backup cannot be created because the Steam path or account ID is unavailable. No categories were changed.
auto.maxReviewsHint: Set max reviews to 0 for unlimited.
auto.ratingRulesOrderHint: Rules are checked from top to bottom. The first matching rule creates the category.
auto.duplicateRuleNames: Some buckets share the same name; matching games will be merged into the same category.
auto.groupNumbers: Group titles starting with numbers as #
auto.groupOther: Group symbols and non-Latin initials as Other
recommend.title: What to Play Next
recommend.empty.desc: Try adjusting filters or fetch more game details
recommend.footer: Scored by Metacritic rating, genre preference, and game length. Fetch HLTB + game details for better results.
achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.subtitle: Sorted by completion % - find what you can platinum
achievements.fetchDetailsFirst: Fetch game details first using Auto-Categorize
achievements.clickFetchAll: Click "Fetch All" to load achievement data
friends.title: Friend Comparison
friends.apiKeyRequired: Set your API key in Settings first.
friends.empty: Enter a friend's Steam ID or profile URL above
friends.empty.saved: or click a saved friend to compare
timeline.title: Play History
timeline.summary: {months} active months · {games} games · grouped by last-played date
timeline.empty.desc: New playtime will appear after the next Steam library refresh
games.emptyCategory.desc: Drag games here to add them
detail.notesPlaceholder: Add your own notes about this game...
detail.sam.title: Steam Achievement Manager
detail.sam.desc: Local Steam achievement tools for this game. Read-only unless write actions are enabled in Settings.
detail.sam.writeDesc: Unlock or lock achievements manually. Repressurizer creates before/after backups for each action.
detail.sam.enableWrites: Enable achievement write actions in Settings to show unlock/lock controls.
detail.sam.backupNote: Each action saves before/after JSON backups with achievement states and Steam unlock timestamps. Steam does not expose a public API to restore original unlock timestamps.
detail.sam.backupsDesc: Choose one of the saved before/after achievement snapshots for this game. Restore changes Steam achievement state, but original unlock timestamps remain reference-only.
detail.sam.noBackups: No SAM backups found for this game yet.
detail.sam.noBackupMatches: No SAM backups match these filters.
detail.sam.confirmUnlock: Unlock {count} achievement(s) on Steam? Repressurizer will create before/after backups first. Original unlock timestamps cannot be restored by Steamworks.
detail.sam.confirmLock: Lock {count} achievement(s) on Steam? Repressurizer will create before/after backups first. Original unlock timestamps cannot be restored by Steamworks.
detail.sam.confirmRestore: Restore achievement state from the selected backup? Repressurizer will still create before/after backups. Original unlock timestamps remain reference-only.
detail.sam.actionDone: {count} achievement change(s) stored. Before backup: {backup}. After backup: {afterBackup}
detail.sam.actionFailed: Steam did not apply {count} achievement change(s): {ids}. This can happen with protected, stat-bound, server-side achievements or a running game. Before backup: {backup}. After backup: {afterBackup}
onboarding.family.tokenNeeded: Steam Family usually needs the Steam Store webapi_token. Open the token page, copy the JSON, paste it here, then retry.
onboarding.family.readyWithShared: Steam Family ready: {count} shared games found.
onboarding.family.readyEmpty: Steam Family checked. No shared games were returned for this account.
onboarding.family.notMember: This Steam account does not look like a member of a Steam Family group.
onboarding.family.apiRejected: Steam rejected the normal Web API key for Family data. Paste the Steam Store webapi_token and retry.
onboarding.family.fallback: Repressurizer can show games available through Steam Family when Steam allows access.
ignored.steamDetails.desc: Games with {count}+ confirmed unavailable Steam Store responses. Transient network/rate-limit errors are retried later.
ignored.hltb.desc: Games not found on HowLongToBeat after {count}+ confirmed searches. Skipped on future fetches.
onboarding.family.readyWithSharedOne: Steam Family ready: {count} shared game found.
dialog.resize: Resize dialog. Use the arrow keys to adjust.
settings.updates.banner.desc: Download and restart when you are ready.
settings.updates.autoCheck.desc: Look for a new GitHub release shortly after startup and every {hours} hours while the app is open.
settings.credits.title: Credits
settings.credits.body: Repressurizer continues Depressurizer, from julianxhokaxhiu's fork, rebuilt in Tauri by
settings.credits.thanks: Thanks to the original Depressurizer project, its fork maintainers, and everyone who kept the idea alive.
settings.libraryAutoRefresh.desc: Check for newly added Steam games every {minutes} minutes while Repressurizer is running.
friends.importEmpty: No friends were returned. Your friends list may be private.
appearance.detailHltb.desc: Display playtime estimates in game details.
appearance.detailMetacritic.desc: Display critic score in game details when available.
appearance.detailPrice.desc: Display current price, discount, and currency in game details.
stats.bestValue.desc: Lowest cost for every hour you actually played
steamTools.title: Steam Tools
steamTools.subtitle: Read-only Steam tools and optional SAM achievement controls.
steamTools.sam.title: SAM integration: Steam Achievement Manager
steamTools.sam.desc: Shows SAM tools in game achievement pages.
steamTools.achievements.title: Achievement Manager
steamTools.achievements.desc: Summary from the Steam Web API. Read-only.
settings.steamTools.achievementWrites.de: Enables unlock/lock buttons. Every action asks for confirmation and saves before/after backups.
settings.import.shortcuts.requireSteam: Steam path and user are required before importing shortcuts.
settings.import.shortcuts.none: No non-Steam shortcuts found for this Steam user.
settings.import.legacy.requireSteam: Steam path and user are required before importing legacy sharedconfig.
settings.import.legacy.none: No legacy sharedconfig categories found for this Steam user.
settings.import.licenses.requireSteam: Steam path and user are required before importing the local license library.
settings.import.licenses.none: No local license library apps found for this Steam user.
